etimesWho is Gitanjali J Angmo? Sonam Wangchuk's wife, social activist and educator who firmly stood by him during his time in jailLadakh activist Sonam Wangchuk is out of jail after six months, detained under NSA during climate protests. His wife, Gitanjali J Angmo, a social entrepreneur, stood by him, visiting him in Jodhpur and sharing her relief post-release. The couple, who met at an education conference, share a deep bond and similar life philosophies.

etimesIs the milk you drink safe? Detergent traces found in milk during tanker check in GujaratConcerns over milk safety have resurfaced in Junagadh after a tanker was stopped and an initial test revealed traces of detergent and synthetic substances. Officials, alerted to a suspected fake dairy operation, found the tanker en route from Leria village. While further lab tests are pending, residents are demanding stricter action and better equipment for food safety officers.

etimesHumanoid robot ‘arrested’ by police after startling elderly woman; she was taken to hospitalA startling encounter in Macau saw an elderly woman surprised by a humanoid robot. Police intervened, escorting the robot away. The robot, used for promotions, had approached the woman unexpectedly. She was checked at a hospital as a precaution. The robot has appeared in public before. The education center apologized for any concern caused.
